sqlMap.select: select * from reference where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.insert: insert into reference(metaobjectno, structureno, metaobject description developercomments helptext tiptext seq userdefineunittestcase ) values (#metaobjectno:NUMERIC#, #structureno:NUMERIC#, #metaobject# #description# #developercomments# #helptext# #tiptext# #seq# #userdefineunittestcase# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('reference') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select referenceno, metaobject, description, developercomments, helptext, tiptext, seq, userdefineunittestcase, metaobjectno, structureno from reference where referenceno = #referenceno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update reference set
metaobject = #metaobject# metaobject = null description = #description# description = null developercomments = #developercomments# developercomments = null helptext = #helptext# helptext = null tiptext = #tiptext# tiptext = null seq = #seq# seq = null userdefineunittestcase = #userdefineunittestcase# userdefineunittestcase = null
where referenceno = #referenceno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from reference where referenceno = #referenceno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from reference where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select referenceno, metaobject, description, developercomments, helptext, tiptext, seq, userdefineunittestcase, metaobjectno, structureno from reference where referenceno = #referenceno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
select referenceno, metaobjectno, structureno, metaobject, seq from reference where metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
